caption: A woman with her hair in a blonde-tipped bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a recording studio. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a yellow vertical stripe runs down the wall. To her right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and black text, with smaller text below it stating "--- Box 11 Logo Guide". A smaller "PODCAST" logo is also visible on the screen behind her. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks toward someone off-camera to her right. Her expression remains relatively consistent, though she slightly tilts her head and shifts her gaze as she listens and prepares to speak, while the camera and background remain static.
